dashboard.title: Your Courses
dashboard.empty: No courses yet. Create one to get started!
dashboard.subtitle: Resume goals, approvals, and active agent work across your courses.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Upload a PDF, scrape a URL, or paste your notes to get started with AI-powered learning.
chat.empty: Start a conversation about your course materials
quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.question: Question
notes.title: AI Notes
notes.empty: Upload course materials to generate notes
upload.title: Upload Materials
upload.drag: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
upload.supported: Supported: PDF, PPTX, DOCX, HTML, TXT, MD
flashcard.title: Flashcards
progress.title: Learning Progress
pref.title: Preferences
template.title: Learning Templates
canvas.title: Canvas Integration
settings.title: Settings
settings.templatesDescription: Apply a template to set your learning preferences. You can always customize later.
settings.runtimeUnavailable: Unable to load runtime health from the API server.
settings.localAiDescription: Run AI completely free and offline with Ollama. Detect your local Ollama instance, pick a model, and switch in one click.
settings.templatesEmpty: No templates available. They will be created on first server start.
settings.status.readyDesc: A real LLM provider is configured and healthy.
settings.status.degradedDesc: A provider is configured, but the active provider is unhealthy or degraded.
settings.status.configurationRequiredDes: This app requires a real LLM provider, but no API key or local backend is configured.
settings.status.mockFallbackDesc: No real LLM is configured. The app is running with local mock responses.
settings.singleUserNote: This project is configured for OpenClaw-style local deployment. There is no end-user sign-in flow by default; the local owner account is bound automatically.
settings.localModeHelp: Keep `AUTH_ENABLED=false` and `DEPLOYMENT_MODE=single_user` for local use. If these drift, run `bash scripts/check_local_mode.sh` before debugging anything else.
settings.migrationHelp: Database migrations are not fully applied or the schema is not tracked by Alembic. Run `bash scripts/dev_local.sh migrate-host`, or use `python -m alembic stamp head` if the tables already match the latest schema.
settings.providerStorageHelp: Paste provider API keys here for local use. Keys are stored in `apps/api/.env` on this machine and the backend reloads the LLM registry after saving.
settings.apiKeyTooShort: API key must be at least 8 characters
settings.localProviderHelp: No API key is needed. Make sure the local backend for this provider is running, then save this provider as primary.
settings.keepSavedKey: Leave blank to keep the saved key unchanged.
settings.localTestHelp: Connection tests call the local runtime directly.
settings.deleteKeyDescription: This removes the saved API key from local config. You can still keep an unsaved draft in the input field.
settings.savedKeyDeleteFailed: Failed to delete saved provider key
settings.localAiComingSoon: Local AI setup wizard coming soon.
settings.exportDescription: Download all your learning data as a portable SQLite database.
runtimeAlert.llmMockBody: A real LLM is not configured. Chat, notes, quizzes, and planning may return placeholder-style mock output.
runtimeAlert.llmConfigBody: A real LLM is required, but no working provider is configured. AI actions will fail until you connect one.
runtimeAlert.llmDegradedBody: The active provider is unhealthy. Responses may fail, slow down, or fall back unexpectedly.
runtimeAlert.schemaBody: Migrations are not fully applied. Run the migration step before trusting new writes.
runtimeAlert.sandboxBody: Code execution features depend on Docker or Podman. Until that runtime is available, execution tasks may fail.
new.mode.title: How would you like to add content?
new.mode.subtitle: Choose how you want to bring learning materials into your new project.
new.mode.uploadDesc: Upload PDF, PPT, DOCX files from your computer
new.mode.urlDesc: Auto-fetch content from course websites and pages
new.mode.bothDesc: Upload files and scrape URLs together
new.projectNameTooLong: Project name must be 100 characters or fewer
new.dragFiles: Drag files here, or click to browse
new.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
new.canvasAuthedBody: Your Canvas session is active. Content will be fetched with your credentials.
new.canvasDetectedBody: This URL requires authentication. Click "Login & Add" to sign in with your university credentials.
new.autoscrapeDesc: Automatically fetch updates from added URLs on a schedule.
new.remindExpiry: Remind me when login session expires
new.processingDesc: Progress now comes directly from backend ingestion jobs. If you enter early, the workspace will keep updating while imports finish.
new.featureTitle: What should Agent do for you?
new.featureSubtitle: Select the features you want to enable for this project. You can change these later.
new.notesFeatureDesc: Restructure your materials into clean, organized notes in your preferred format.
new.practiceFeatureDesc: Generate practice questions from your materials. Interactive Q&A with instant feedback.
new.reviewFeatureDesc: Track, diagnose, and revisit incorrect answers from generated quizzes.
new.planFeatureDesc: Generate a personalized study plan with scheduled reviews.
new.qaFeatureDesc: Ask any question about your materials and get AI-powered answers with source references.
new.extraPrompt: Anything else you'd like to tell Agent?
new.extraPromptPlaceholder: e.g. "Use bullet points for notes", "Focus on algorithms", "Explain in simple terms"...
new.canvasLoginDesc: Sign in with your university credentials to access Canvas course content.
new.allJobsFailed: All ingestion jobs failed. Review the processing log for the backend error details, then go back and retry.
new.credentialsNote: Your credentials are used once to establish a browser session and are not stored.
new.logNoSources: No files or URLs submitted. You can continue and add content later.
new.logAutoScrapeEnabled: Auto-scrape enabled for this URL (every 24 hours)
new.logAuthTip: Tip: Go to Settings to authenticate, then retry.
new.canvasBrowserHelp: Please complete your university login (Okta / SSO / MFA) in the browser window. This dialog will close automatically once login is detected.
new.browserSessionNote: Your session cookies will be saved locally after login. No passwords are stored.
new.loginTimeout: Login timed out or was cancelled. Click Retry to open the browser again.
new.logCanvasOpening: Canvas LMS detected - opening browser for login...
new.logBrowserTip: Tip: Complete login in the browser window, then retry.
onboarding.language.title: What language do you prefer?
onboarding.language.subtitle: Choose the primary language for Agent's responses and generated notes.
onboarding.language.zhDescription: Answer and generate notes in Chinese
onboarding.language.autoDescription: Use the same language as the source material
onboarding.learningMode.title: How do you prefer to learn?
onboarding.learningMode.subtitle: Choose a learning style that suits you best. This helps Agent adapt its teaching approach.
onboarding.learningMode.conceptFirstDesc: Understand theory before practice. Best for building deep understanding.
onboarding.learningMode.practiceFirstDes: Jump into exercises, learn by doing. Review theory as needed.
onboarding.learningMode.balancedDescript: Alternate between concepts and practice for a well-rounded experience.
onboarding.detailLevel.title: How detailed should notes be?
onboarding.detailLevel.subtitle: Choose the level of detail for generated notes and explanations.
onboarding.detailLevel.conciseDescriptio: Key points only. Bullet points and short summaries.
onboarding.detailLevel.balancedDescripti: Balanced depth with explanations where needed.
onboarding.detailLevel.detailedDescripti: In-depth explanations with examples and analogies.
onboarding.layout.title: Choose your workspace layout
onboarding.layout.subtitle: Pick a default layout for your learning workspace. You can change this anytime.
onboarding.layout.balancedDescription: PDF & Notes side by side with chat panel
onboarding.layout.chatFocusedDescription: PDF, Notes, and Chat all visible
onboarding.finish.title: You're all set!
onboarding.finish.subtitle: You can upload example notes or materials later from within any course. Click "Finish Setup" to start learning.
onboarding.summary.title: Your preferences:
onboarding.summary.later: You can upload example notes and materials later from the upload dialog within any course.
onboarding.saved: Preferences saved! Your experience is now personalized.
